title: Updated
description: A mod all about enhancing the Survival experience.
body:
# Updated
Welcome to Updated! A mod all about enhancing the survival experience to make Minecraft more fun for everyone!

!["Frequently Asked Questions" Image](https://i.imgur.com/fJYRYZu.png '"Frequently Asked Questions" Image')
---
### Q: When did this mod's development begin?
A: June 22nd, 2023.
### Q: Where can I download this mod?
A: On Modrinth and CurseForge.
### Q: If I don't know what a feature does, or how I can use it, where can I find that information?
A: On the mod's [Wiki page (W.I.P)](https://github.com/xXWillyCodezXx/updated/wiki 'Updated mod Wiki').
### Q: What mod loader(s) does this mod support?
A: It currently only supports Fabric, but some mods out there allow you to alter the mod loader that Fabric mods use.
### Q: What versions does this mod support?
A: I try to update it to the latest snapshot/version, whenever they come out.

!["Features" Image](https://i.imgur.com/ZFUJhNe.png '"Features" Image')
---
For an in-depth analysis of all features included in this mod, please refer to the [Wiki page (W.I.P)](https://github.com/xXWillyCodezXx/updated/wiki 'Updated mod Wiki')! Otherwise, this page also contains a spoiler list containing every feature below:

_**WARNING: SPOILERS!!!**_
--------------------------

## Additions

### Sculky Amethyst
* Sculky Amethyst Shards can be crafted from 1 Amethyst Shard and 1 Sculk Vein Block.
* When smelted, Sculky Amethyst Shards can be converted into Echo Shards.
* Sculky Amethyst Shards can also be compressed into Sculky Amethyst Blocks.

### Jump Block
* You will jump higher than usual when jumping off a Jump Block.
* The arrows on the side can be used as decoration.
* Crafted with Chiseled Stone Bricks, Emeralds, and a Rabbit's Foot.

### Golden Potato
* Golden Potatoes replenish all of your hunger and will give you saturation.
* Crafted from 8 Gold Ingots and 1 Potato.

### Music Discs
* New Music Discs have been added, Tall and Beginning.
* The rightful owners of these Music Discs have been properly credited.
* Tall is obtained from crafting 9 Disc Fragments, which are obtained from a Creeper exploding an Enderman.
* Beginning is found in Desert Village chests exclusively.
* Each new Music Disc has a unique song.

### Ancient Brush
* Ancient Brushes have low durability and will break faster than regular Brushes.
* Ancient Brushes cannot remove Scutes from Armadillos and Turtles.
* Ancient Brushes cannot be crafted, and they're only found in Desert Wells and Trail Ruins.
* Ancient Brushes can be repaired back into regular Brushes using a Crafting Table.

### Ore Detector
* Ore Detectors detect ore beneath any right-clicked block.
* Ore Detectors have durability and will break somewhat fast, so use them wisely.
* When Ore Detectors detect ore, they will show color-coded text on the screen telling you which ore has been found.
* Ore Detectors don't work in the Nether or End.
* Ore Detectors cannot detect ores from other dimensions.
* Can be crafted with 6 Iron Ingots, 1 Amethyst Shard, 1 Redstone Dust, and 1 Diamond.

### Upgraded Ore Detector
* An upgraded version of the Ore Detector.
* Upgraded Ore Detectors can detect ores in the Nether.
* Upgraded Ore Detectors can detect ores from the Nether.
* Upgraded Ore Detectors can be crafted with a regular Ore Detector, a Netherite Ingot, and a Netherite Upgrade Template in a Smithing Table.

### Identifier
* Identifiers can be crafted with 1 Iron Ingot and 4 Redstone Dust.
* Identifiers can be used to identify Blocks and Entities, primarily for newer players.

### Marigold
* Marigolds are new flowers found in Desert and Savanna biomes.
* Marigolds can be crafted into Yellow Dye.
* Marigolds, unlike other flowers, can be planted on Sand and Red Sand.
* Can be planted in Flower Pots.
* Bees are attracted to Marigolds.

### Cloud Bottle
* Obtained by using a Bottle at the Cloud height.
* Can be used to make Cloud Torches and Bamboo Blowpipes.
* Can be emptied when right-clicked on the ground.
* When crafted, it will leave an Empty Glass Bottle behind.

### Cloud Torch
* A new variant of Torches.
* To obtain Cloud Torches, Torches are crafted with a Cloud Bottle, or you can right-click a Torch with a Cloud Bottle.
* Cloud Torches make you instantly fly high up in the sky.
* You can sneak around Cloud Torches to avoid being launched into the air.
* Useful for making non-complex elevators.

### Suspicious Dirt
* Like Suspicious Sand and Suspicious Gravel, it can hold items within.
* Acts just like Suspicious Sand and Suspicious Gravel.
* Doesn't generate naturally yet.

### Morning Bud/Morning Glory
* The Morning Bud is a new crop that only Sniffers can find.
* Morning Buds can be planted on Farmland to grow the Morning Glory.
* Upon planting a Morning Bud, "A Seedy Place" and "Planting the Past" will be granted.
* The Morning Glory is a new variant of Vines and is mostly just a decorative plant.
* The Morning Glory can grow just like regular Vines.

### Toggle Lamp
* A variant of Redstone Lamps that you can directly toggle.
* Instead of being powered by Redstone, the Toggle Lamp powers Redstone.
* Crafted from 1 Redstone Lamp and 1 Lever.

### Bromeliaceae Flower
* 3 new flowers found exclusively in Jungles.
* Can be crafted into their respective Dye colors.
* Can be planted in Flower Pots.
* Bees are attracted to these flowers.

### Bush/Trimmed Bush
* Bushes are new plants found in most forest biomes.
* Bushes can be moved to a more likable location.
* Bushes can be trimmed using Shears.
* Trimmed Bushes have a better, more uniform look.
* Upon being Trimmed, Bushes will drop a Stick.
* Trimmed Bushes will eventually grow back into regular Bushes.

### Soul Candle
* A new variant of Candles.
* Soul Candles can be crafted with 1 Soul Sand/Soul Soil and 1 String.
* Soul Candles do not currently emit Soul Flames, however. - Something that is currently being looked into.
* Despite not emitting Soul Flames, Soul Candles will still have a blue light on them when lit.
* Soul Candles can also be placed on Cake.

### Reinforced Iron Blocks
* Crafted with 1 Iron Block surrounded by 8 Iron Ingots, you will get 8.
* An Iron Block harder than a regular one.
* Has a vertical Iron Block texture.

### Iron Pillar
* Crafted with 2 Iron Blocks, you will get 16.
* Can be rotated.

### Iron Plaque
* Crafted with 1 Iron Nugget and 6 Iron Ingots, you will get 3.
* An Iron version of a Sign.
* Can be placed on the ground or a wall.

### Crossed Rail
* Crafted from 2 Rails.
* Allows a Minecart to approach from any given direction, and easily cross it.
* Can make a cool minigame where you have to push a Minecart around.

### Bamboo Blowpipe
* A new instrument that makes a unique tune.
* Bamboo Blowpipes can be blown into rapidly when sneaking.
* Crafted with 1 Bamboo and 1 Cloud Bottle.

### Emerald Tools/Armor
* Emerald Tools and Armor are stronger than Iron, but weaker than Diamond, making it an optional upgrade.
* Emerald Tools and Armor cannot be enchanted much, other than Mending and Unbreaking.
* Emerald Armor can be trimmed.

### Dynamite
* Crafted from 1 TNT block.
* Can be crafted back into TNT.
* Can be thrown.
* Explodes upon impact with anything.
* When underwater, Dynamite will not emit smoke particles, and will not explode upon impact with any solid surfaces. Dynamite will instead drop as an item again upon impact with a solid surface underwater.
* Upon impact with Lava, Fire/Soul Fire, or a lit Campfire/Soul Campfire, Dynamite will create a stronger, fiery explosion.

### Patina
* Dropped from scraping oxidation off Copper Blocks.
* Can be used to manually oxidize Copper Blocks.

### Orange
* A new food item dropped exclusively from Jungle Leaves.

### Breeze Rod
* Currently doesn't have any functionality.
* Can be dropped from killing a Breeze.
* Only available when the Update 1.21 experiment is enabled.

### Dripstone Boulder
* Can be thrown.
* Knocks mobs back further than any other projectile.
* Used by the new Boulder mob.
* Can break Pointed Dripstone.

### Copper Bucket
* Crafted from 3 Copper Ingots in the shape of a Bucket.
* Copper buckets can only pick up water, and will break upon emptying them.
* Attempting to pick up Lava with Copper Buckets will make them burn.
* Attempting to pick up Powder Snow with Copper Buckets will make them break.
* Cannot be used via Dispenser.
* Breaks upon emptying.

### Netherite Horse Armor
* Stronger than Diamond Horse Armor, and can be obtained by upgrading Diamond Horse Armor to Netherite Horse Armor in a Smithing Table.

### Boulder
* A new hostile creature that calls the Dripstone Cave biome its home.
* Throws Dripstone Boulders at the player and any other threat to defend what it calls home.
* Also attacks anything that provokes it.
* Currently has placeholder sounds.

### Abandoned Barn
* A new structure that can be found almost anywhere within the overworld.
* Abandoned Barns contain decent loot in a double chest up above.
* Abandoned Barns also contain a few secrets.
* Abandoned Barns are the place to find Zombie Horses, as previously, you couldn't.

### New Advancements
* Sky-High: Stand on a Jump Block and then jump off into the sky.
* Payback: Hurt a Boulder with a Dripstone Boulder.

## Changes
* Saddles can now be removed from mobs.
* Short Grass and Sugar Cane can now be planted in Flower Pots.
* You can now rename Boats to give them a custom display name.
* You can now use a Brush on a Turtle to obtain Turtle Scutes. The Brush will instantly break after doing this, however.

### Saddle Removal Mechanic
* Saddles can now be removed from mobs by sneaking and right-clicking said mob.
* If a supported mob is currently riding on top of the Saddle, it will make a noise to signify that it's currently a passenger of the mob it's riding, and the Saddle will not be removed.
>
